title: critoniopsis bitriflora
intro: Critoniopsis bitriflora, also known as the "Prairie Sunflower," is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central America and Mexico. It belongs to the Asteraceae family and is a perennial shrub, producing yellow flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Critoniopsis bitriflora include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Critoniopsis bitriflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
